macro.title: Housing market update: Regional fragmentation grows as rates pressure demand
macro.what: National housing trends are holding steady, but local markets are splitting as price cuts rise, demand slows and transactions become harder to close.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: UWM adds 50-bps incentive for brokers as spring home purchase season ramps up
macro.what: UWM offers a 50-bps purchase incentive for locked loans from April 8-14, with a 700 FICO score minimum and key product exclusions.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: FinCEN proposes new anti-money laundering rule for financial institutions
macro.what: Public comment will be accepted for 60 days after the proposal is published in the Federal Register in the coming days.

housing.title: Broker-lender pacts are redrawing the lines for reverse mortgage companies
housing.what: New broker-lender agreements are reshaping how reverse mortgage companies work together while taking aim at one of the industry's most persistent problems: churning.

housing.title: Newrez faces Washington state enforcement action over alleged servicing failures
housing.what: The Washington State Department of Financial Institutions (DFI) filed a statement of charges against Newrez, alleging repeated mortgage servicing violations between 2021 and 2026.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Mortgage applications edge down as refis stall, purchase demand weakens
housing.what: Mortgage applications fell 0.8% as the 30-year fixed rate dipped to 6.51%, with refis down 3% and purchases up 1%.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Nearly 1 in 2 home listings cut prices in Florida, Arizona
housing.what: Roughly 45% of all listings in Arizona and 44% in Florida now carry price reductions
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Rancho Mission Viejo sets up last all-age phase at Rienda ahead of next growth wave
notables.what: Rancho Mission Viejo has tapped Trumark Homes, Lennar and Shea Homes to build 232 homes in the final all-age phase of the Village of Rienda, effectively capping new market-rate supply at the Orange County master plan until 2027, according to a company announcement
notables.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
notables.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

notables.title: Better plans $69M stock raise, UK bank sale
notables.what: The company on Wednesday announced it plans to raise about $69 million in gross proceeds before underwriting discounts, commissions and offering expenses via a public offering of C
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
